// @camis:generated — do not edit; regenerated by camis
import { transformTitle } from "../../../../hooks/transform-title";

export default {
  async beforeUpdate(event: { params: { data?: Record<string, unknown> } }) {
    const { data } = event.params;
    if (data && data.publishedAt) {
      const out = transformTitle.run({ title: data.title as never });
      data.title = out.title;
    }
  },
};
